productDisplayName: Lotto Men Stadio Potenza White Shoes
description: Designed for runners who never compromise on style and comfort, the Stadio Potenza running shoe from lotto comes with a durable synthetic upper and a grippy rubber outsole that keeps you safe and stable on various surfaces.UpperWater repellent premium plus upper and stitched detailing for durability and comfortLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar for breathable comfort and snug fitCushioned footbed for shock absorptionBranding on the sides, at the back of the collar and on the tongueEVA cushioned midsole and insole for comfortOutsoleThe outsole is stitched to the upper to increase the longevityThe non-marking rubber outsole gives excellent stability and gripshoe careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
